    Index

    G M P R S U 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    G

    getAngle() - Method in class pendulum.Pendulum
    Returns the current pendulum angle in radians.
    getAngularAcceleration(double) - Method in class pendulum.Pendulum
    Computes the current angular acceleration from the pendulum equation.
    getAngularVelocity() - Method in class pendulum.Pendulum
    Returns the current angular velocity in radians per second.
    getLength() - Method in class pendulum.Pendulum
    Returns the pendulum length in meters.
    GRAVITY - Static variable in class pendulum.Pendulum
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class pendulum.Main
    Starts the pendulum simulation.
    Main - Class in pendulum
    Entry point for the large-angle pendulum simulation.
    Main() - Constructor for class pendulum.Main
     

    P

    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class pendulum.PendulumPanel
    Paints the pendulum rod and bob at the current simulation state.
    pendulum - package pendulum
     
    Pendulum - Class in pendulum
    A physical model of a simple pendulum for large-angle simulation.
    Pendulum(double, double) - Constructor for class pendulum.Pendulum
    Constructs a pendulum with a given length and initial angle.
    PendulumPanel - Class in pendulum
    A Swing panel that renders the pendulum using simple 2D graphics.
    PendulumPanel(Pendulum) - Constructor for class pendulum.PendulumPanel
     

    R

    reset() - Method in class pendulum.Pendulum
    Resets the pendulum to the default starting state.
    RK4Integrator - Class in pendulum
    A Runge-Kutta 4th order integrator for numerically updating the pendulum state.
    RK4Integrator() - Constructor for class pendulum.RK4Integrator
     

    S

    SCALE - Static variable in class pendulum.PendulumPanel
     
    SimulationFrame - Class in pendulum
    A JFrame container for the pendulum simulation user interface.
    SimulationFrame(Pendulum, RK4Integrator) - Constructor for class pendulum.SimulationFrame
    Creates a new simulation frame using the given pendulum model and integrator.
    step(Pendulum, double) - Method in class pendulum.RK4Integrator
    Advances the pendulum state by the specified time step using RK4.

    U

    updateAngle(double) - Method in class pendulum.Pendulum
    Updates the pendulum angle.
    updateAngularVelocity(double) - Method in class pendulum.Pendulum
    Updates the pendulum angular velocity.
    updateLength(double) - Method in class pendulum.Pendulum
    Updates the pendulum length.
